    C

    canStack(ItemStack, ItemStack) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.items.ItemUtils

    This Method will consume the Item in the specified slot.

    This Method consumes a specified amount of items from the specified slot.

    create(ItemStack, Material) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.items.CustomItemStack
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    Setting the type via ItemStack.setType(Material) will not be supported soon.

    D

    damageItem(ItemStack, boolean) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.items.ItemUtils
    This method damages the specified Item by 1.
    damageItem(ItemStack, int, boolean) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.items.ItemUtils
    This method damages the specified Item by the given amount.
    dev.yanianz.star.items - package dev.yanianz.star.items
    The items module provides utility classes for easy ItemStack creation, comparison and modification.
    dev.yanianz.star.items.nms - package dev.yanianz.star.items.nms
    This package contains all the NMS code of our items module.

    E

    editColor(Color) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.items.ItemStackUtil
    Curries a Consumer which calls PotionMeta.setColor(Color) or LeatherArmorMeta.setColor(Color) if the ItemMeta is an instance of either.
    editCustomModelData(int) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.items.ItemStackUtil
    Curries a Consumer which sets the custom model data to the given integer
    editCustomModelData(Integer) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.items.ItemStackUtil
    Curries a Consumer which sets the custom model data to the given integer
    editDisplayName(String) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.items.ItemStackUtil
    Curries a Consumer which sets the display name to the given String.
    editLore(String...) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.items.ItemStackUtil
    Curries a Consumer which sets the lore to the given Strings.
    editLore(List) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.items.ItemStackUtil
    Curries a Consumer which sets the lore to the given Strings.
    editMeta(ItemStack, Consumer) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.items.ItemStackUtil
    Applies an edit to the ItemMeta of the given ItemStack, returning whether the changes were successfully applied
    equals(Object) - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.items.ItemStackSnapshot

    This ItemStack, which is not intended for actual usage, caches its ItemMeta.
